README: Copy this file to gcal-service-account.json in the same directory with your actual Google Service Account key.

instructions.step1: Go to https://console.cloud.google.com → Create a project (e.g. 'astro-shreehari')
instructions.step2: Enable Google Calendar API for that project
instructions.step3: Create a Service Account → download the JSON key
instructions.step4: Rename the downloaded JSON file to 'gcal-service-account.json' and place it here
instructions.step5: Open your Google Calendar → Settings → Share with specific people → add the service account email with 'Make changes to events' permission
instructions.step6: Set GCAL_CALENDAR_ID in backend/config/app.php to your Gmail or Google Workspace email

placeholder: Replace this entire file with the actual service account JSON from Google Cloud Console
